title: External advisory bodies for Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## External advisory bodies for Health Canada
In fulfilling its mandate to help people in Canada maintain and improve their health, Health Canada seeks information and advice from other people, groups, agencies and governments. This includes seeking advice from experts using external advisory bodies. These bodies are composed of people who are outside of the federal government, chosen for their knowledge, expertise and experience.
The Health Canada Policy on External Advisory Bodies provides direction to those managing external advisory bodies and how to use their advice. The policy also provides stakeholders and members of the public with accessible information on what to expect when Health Canada seeks advice from an external advisory body.
- Health Canada Policy on External Advisory Bodies (2022)

## Scientific advisory bodies
- Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis
- Science Advisory Committee on Pest Control Products
- Scientific Advisory Board on Vaping Products
- Scientific Advisory Committee on Digital Health Technology
- Scientific Advisory Committee Medical Devices Used in the Cardiovascular System
- Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women
- Scientific Advisory Committee on Mental Health Disorders
- Scientific Advisory Committee on Oncology Therapies
- Scientific Advisory Committee on Pharmaceutical Sciences and Clinical Pharmacology
- Scientific Advisory Committee on Respiratory and Allergy Therapies

## Other advisory bodies
- Chemicals Management Plan Science Committee
- Implementation Advisory Group (IAG) for the National Strategy for Drugs for Rare Diseases
- Pest Management Advisory Council
- Youth Leadership Team (Substance Use)

## Scientific advisory bodies
- Nutrition Science Advisory Committee
- Scientific Advisory Panel on Software as a Medical Device

## Other advisory bodies

- Appropriate Use Advisory Committee
- Canadian Pain Task Force
- COVID-19 Testing and Screening Expert Advisory Panel

- Expert Task Force on Substance Use
- Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 Testing, Screening, Tracing and Data Management
- Ministerial Advisory Council on Mental Health
- National Pharmacare Committee of Experts
- Review of the Federal Approach to Pandemic Science Advice and Research Coordination
